constraints.name: range_bound
constraints.description: For each participant with a required maximum score s, the chosen ladder height h must satisfy Euler's totient function φ(h) ≥ s.

objective.description: 最小化满足所有参与者得分阈值要求的总成本

invariants.name: monotonicity
invariants.description: The minimal cost required to satisfy a given score threshold forms a strictly non-decreasing sequence. The solution precomputes this sequence of candidate costs in sorted order and relies on its monotonic property to correctly apply binary search for resolving each query independently.
